ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., PG, SF) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet and inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "current_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current team the player is on */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the player */,
  "player_agent" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_current_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Value of the team in millions of dollars */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's owner */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "game_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game started */,
  "broadcast_network" TEXT /* Network that broadcast the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of offensive rebounds */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of defensive rebounds */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player */,
  "minutes_played" TEXT /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "game_score" REAL /* Game score of the player */,
  "win_loss" INTEGER /* Whether the player's team won the game */,
  "fouled_out" INTEGER /* Whether the player fouled out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player played for during the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal shooting percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw shooting percentage */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Average turnovers per game */,
  "personal_fouls_per_game" REAL /* Average personal fouls per game */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player efficiency rating */,
  "win_shares" REAL /* Win shares contributed by the player */,
  "all_star_game_selections" INTEGER /* Number of All-Star game selections */,
  "all_nba_selections" INTEGER /* Number of All-NBA team selections */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal shooting percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw shooting percentage */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Average turnovers per game */,
  "personal_fouls_per_game" REAL /* Average personal fouls per game */,
  "team_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Team efficiency rating */,
  "team_pace" REAL /* Team pace (possessions per game) */,
  "playoff_appearance" INTEGER /* Whether the team appeared in the playoffs */,
  "conference_championships" INTEGER /* Number of conference championships won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "current_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current team the coach is on */,
  "career_wins" INTEGER /* Total career wins */,
  "career_losses" INTEGER /* Total career losses */,
  "career_win_percentage" REAL /* Career win percentage */,
  "coaching_philosophy" TEXT /* Coaching philosophy (e.g., defensive-minded, fast-paced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_current_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "opened_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was opened */,
  "stadium_type" TEXT /* Type of the stadium (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  "parking_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of parking spots available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "accessed_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed (e.g., player, team, game) */,
  "accessed_entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity being accessed (e.g., player, team, game) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual return date */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "contract_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the contract started */,
  "contract_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the contract ends */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract in millions of dollars */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
